board.name: WorkAI Disposable Smoke
board.purpose: Disposable Fizzy board for proving fizzy-symphony against a safe fake repo.

expected_artifacts: Fizzy board with a real golden ticket

golden_tickets.title: Golden: verify WorkAI smoke loop
golden_tickets.description: Run the disposable board through RCC workitems and Codex runner, then confirm each task card received a useful update.

task_cards.title: Add CLI greeting punctuation
task_cards.description: In sample_project/workai_smoke/cli.py, make the greeting end with an exclamation point. Keep tests green.

task_cards.title: Document sample usage
task_cards.description: Update sample_project/README.md with a short command example for running the greeting script.

task_cards.title: Tighten greeting test
task_cards.description: Add or update a test that proves the sample greeting contains the provided name.

task_cards.title: Add shout mode
task_cards.description: Add a --shout option to the sample CLI that prints the greeting in uppercase while preserving punctuation.
task_cards.expected_artifact: CLI option and test coverage for uppercase greeting

task_cards.title: Add farewell helper
task_cards.description: Add a farewell(name) helper that returns a friendly goodbye string without changing the default greeting command.
task_cards.expected_artifact: New helper plus focused unit test

task_cards.title: Expose package version
task_cards.description: Add a __version__ value to workai_smoke and a --version flag to the CLI.
task_cards.expected_artifact: Version constant and CLI flag test

task_cards.title: Add JSON output mode
task_cards.description: Add a --json option that prints a JSON object with the provided name and greeting.

task_cards.title: Write smoke completion checklist
task_cards.description: Update sample_project/README.md with a checklist for verifying code, tests, and Fizzy report-back after the agent run.
